notes: Landing page is now the app entry point. manifest.json start_url -> ./index.html, so the installed PWA opens the PHANTOM landing screen and ENTER routes to dct-ios.html. The landing (index.html) is added to the service-worker PRECACHE_URLS so it loads offline on a cold launch, and it now registers the service worker itself for offline-first robustness on first visit. No app logic changed — this is entry/manifest/cache wiring only. Bare .../phantom/ serves the landing (front door); FORGE-01 GPU Ops moved to /phantom/forge.html. Three stamps aligned at v1.6.64.
